NewDelhi, the 12thMay, 2005 8.0. 665(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by Sub-section (l) ofSection 3 of the Conservation ofForeign Exchange and Plevenfion of Smuggling Activities Act, 1974 (52 of 1974), the Central Govermnent hereby specially empowers Ms. Kameswaxi Subramanian, Joint Secretary to the Government of India, for the purpose of the said Section. [F.No. 671/18/2001-CUS. VH1] N. M. KRISHNAN, Dy. Secy.
